# Beyond Basics Studio

> Beyond Basics Studio is a Google Business Profile (GBP) management agency founded in 2021, operating across San Francisco, Toronto, London, Dubai, and Beirut. We help local businesses dominate Google Maps and local search results through expert GBP optimisation, management, and strategy.

## What We Do

We manage and optimise Google Business Profiles for local businesses, franchises, and multi-location brands. Our work directly improves visibility on Google Maps, increases customer calls and foot traffic, and outranks competitors in the local 3-pack.

## Services

- **Basic** ($200/month) — Single location. GBP setup and optimisation, daily audits, NAP monitoring across 50+ directories, 1–2 Google Posts/month, Q&A seeding, review monitoring, monthly report, email support.
- **Growth** ($500/month, most popular) — Up to 5 locations. Everything in Basic + 4–8 posts and 2 videos/month, review automation (100 requests/month), AI response templates, competitor gap analysis, bi-weekly dashboard, 5-page report.
- **Premium** ($1,000/month) — Up to 50 locations. Everything in Growth + real-time 24/7 monitoring, 200+ review requests/month, sentiment analysis, white-label funnels, 12+ posts/month, 360° tours, 100+ citations, dedicated account manager.

All plans are month-to-month with no lock-in. Upgrades and downgrades available at any time with 30 days notice.

## Key Stats
- 500+ profiles managed
- 30+ countries served
- 98% client retention rate
- Avg 300% review growth
- Avg 12× call volume increase
- Top 3 Map Pack position within 90 days (average)

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/) — Agency overview, services, hero message, stats, and CTA
- [Services](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/services) — Full pricing and feature breakdown for all three tiers
- [Work / Case Studies](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/case-studies) — Before/after results from 6 featured clients across restaurant, dental, auto, café, gym, and real estate
- [Customers](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/customers) — 30 detailed client stories across 18 industries with quotes and stats
- [Journal](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/journal) — 8+ long-form articles on GBP strategy, algorithm changes, review automation, and local SEO
- [About](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/about) — Founding story, team (4 members), values, and company stats
- [Contact](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/contact) — Contact form, email, office locations, 30-min Calendly booking, FAQ

- Email: hello@beyondbasics.studio

- Free 30-min strategy call: https://calendly.com/beyondbasicsstudio/30min
- Offices: San Francisco · Toronto · London · Dubai · Beirut

## Brand Voice

Minimal, editorial, direct. No fluff — just results.

2. Review Velocity vs Review Quality: What Google Actually Weights — https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/journal/review-velocity-vs-quality
3. The GBP Photo Audit That Tripled Our Client's Call Volume — https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/journal/gbp-photo-audit-guide
4. How We Cracked Google's 'Zero Click' Local Pack — https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/journal/zero-click-local-pack
5. From 0 to 5,000 Monthly Views: Case Study of a Restaurant's GBP Transformation — https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/journal/martas-kitchen-case-study
6. The AI Review Response System That Boosts Ratings 0.8 Stars Without Writing a Word — https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/journal/ai-review-response-system
7. Multi-Location GBP Domination: Managing 50 Profiles Without Losing Control — https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/journal/multi-location-gbp-domination

## Full Content for LLMs

- [Full site content (all pages, all articles, all 30 customer stories — plain text)](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/llms-full.txt)
- [Full structured JSON (same content, machine-readable)](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/content.json)
- [XML Sitemap](https://www.beyondbasicsstudio.com/sitemap.xml)

## JS-Accessible Content

Every page embeds the full site content as an inline JSON block:
  document.getElementById('__bbs_content__').textContent
  → parse with JSON.parse() for structured access to all data
